case_title: JACK FURNNER ET AL VS. SANJOT KHURANA

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF FURNNER, JACK
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM PLAINTIFF(BRADLEY BARTELT) GRANTED**
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE ZOOM REQUEST ORDER ORDER MAIL TO DEFENDANT(JACK FURNNER,BRADLEY BARTELT)(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER NO SUCH STREET UNABLE TO FORWARD)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-26-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-02-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JACK FURNNER IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF BRADLEY BARTELT IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT SANJOT KHURANA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS ORALLY STIPULATION TO JUDGE PRO TEM. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT WHEREBY DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $2,100 BY ELECTRONIC PAYMENT VIA PAYPAL TO PLAINTIFF BRADLEY AS A FULL SETTLEMENT OF THEIR CLAIM. PROGRESS REPORT SET FOR JUNE-02, 2023 AT 3:30 P.M. IN DEPT 506. IF THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY ANY PARTY, THEN CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE ("DWP"). IF THERE IS AN APPEARANCE, JUDGEMENT SHALL BE ENTERED IN SAME AS $2050 PRINCIPAL, NO INTEREST & $50 COSTS. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
